ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type (e.g., Afferent / Efferent Arteriole Endothelial) */,
  "ontology_term_id" TEXT /* Ontology term ID for the cell type (e.g., CL:1001096) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cell type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_levels" (
  "annotation_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation level */,
  "annotation_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation level (e.g., kidney_l3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the annotation level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation level was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_data" (
  "cell_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "annotation_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation level */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the subject (e.g., W, B) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of cells */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cells */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "laterality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laterality */,
  "y_pos" REAL /* Y-position of the cells */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_laterality_id FOREIGN KEY ("laterality_id") REFERENCES laterality ("laterality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_annotation_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_level_id") REFERENCES annotation_levels ("annotation_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_data_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., upper pole) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laterality" (
  "laterality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laterality */,
  "laterality_name" TEXT /* Name of the laterality (e.g., right) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the laterality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the laterality was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the laterality was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laterality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Project A, Dataset B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
